snippet.title: Moira Dela Torre - Paubaya | Official Music Video | feat. Joshua Garcia & Julia Barretto
snippet.description:
At dito nagtatapos ang kabanata ng Patawad. 
Sana naramdaman mo yung "kalma. Yung lubag ng loob." 

Sana lahat tayo ay lumabas na handang sumugal at magmahal muli. 
At maalala natin palagi na ang pag-asa ay hindi isang pantasya na binubulag tayo sa katotohanan. Dahil lahat ng bagay ay may dahilan. 
Hindi ka nag-iisa.
Kaya ang tanging panalangin na isinisigaw ko sa hangin
ay sana sa pagsalubong natin sa bagong umaga, 
Tayo'y natutong magpatawad at humingi ng tawad;
Magpalaya at lumaya; 
at higit sa lahat, natutong ipaubaya ang lahat sa Kanya. 


Hanggang sa susunod na kabanata. 
Salamat sa'yo.

**english subtitles are available** 

Moira Dela Torre - Paubaya | Official Music Video 

Starring: Joshua Garcia and Julia Barretto 

Directed by: Niq Ablao

snippet.title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake hits Japan off Fukushima coast | DW News
snippet.description:
A magnitude 7.3 earthquake struck northeastern Japan, off the coast of Fukushima, on Saturday night. More than 130 people have been reported injured and some 860,000 homes are without power. The Meteorological Agency believes this was an aftershock from the massive earthquake that hit the region in 2011.
The initial quake was followed by a series of aftershocks.
Back in 2011, a similar earthquake in the same region triggered a tsunami. That caused a severe nuclear accident. The Fukushima nuclear power plant had a meltdown that leaked radiation into the atmosphere and the Pacific Ocean. The clean-up from that disaster will likely take another 30 to 40 years. 
Japanese Prime Minister Yoshihide Suga has dismissed worries that  Fukushima's nuclear plant could suffer a new leak from this latest quake.
As residents began cleaning up the aftermath, officials are calling on people to remain on the alert for further aftershocks in the coming weeks.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

snippet.title: Duterte slams Robredo, Lacson for likening his VFA threat to extortion
snippet.description:
Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte in a recorded speech aired on Monday, February 15, rants against Vice President Leni Robredo and Senator Panfilo Lacson after the two criticized him for publicly demanding that Americans pay if they wanted the Visiting Forces Agreement to continue.
Full story: https://www.rappler.com/nation/duterte-slams-robredo-lacson-likening-vfa-threat-extortion

snippet.title: REACTING TO THE CRAZIEST RUMORS ABOUT ME | Heart Evangelista
snippet.description:
It’s been a year since we last did an assumption video and today, I’m adding a little twist by reacting to the craziest rumors you’ve heard about me over the years. Enjoy! 😉

LOVE MARIE ONGPAUCO-ESCUDERO (known in the Philippine entertainment industry as Heart Evangelista) started her career at the age of 13 as a commercial model and actress. Her 20 years of hard work paved the way to numerous acting and hosting projects and awards. Through the years, she has evolved from being a professional actor and television host to a sought-after international and local brand endorser, sold-out visual artist, best-selling author, fashion influencer, beauty icon, and entrepreneur. She is one of the country’s most recognized celebrities, and advocates for children’s health and education, individuals with special needs, and animal welfare. She wishes to share these passions with the world through this platform.

Official music video by Alamat performing 'kbye'

Alamat is a 9-member sing-rap-dance boy group from the Philippines that sings and performs in multiple Philippine languages. The members and their respective ethnicities are: Taneo (Kalinga/Ilocano), Mo (Half-Black, Half-Filipino), Jao (Kapampangan), Kin (Tagalog), Tomas (Bicolano), R-Ji (Waray-Waray), Valfer (Hiligaynon), Gami (Bisaya), and Alas (Mindanawon/Bisaya).

snippet.title: CHUNG HA 청하 'Bicycle' MV
snippet.description:
CHUNG HA 청하 'Bicycle' MV

Stream/ Download 'Bicycle' : https://ffm.to/chungha_bicycle
Subscribe CHUNG HA : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Gxb0gMCh3EPIDLQXeQUog

CHUNG HA The 1st Studio Album [ Querencia ] 'Bicycle'

With the strong fuzz guitar intro this song expresses the excitement and overwhelming energy of going forward by stepping on the pedal with R&B pop-trap sounds.
The straightforward lyrics in the chorus that lead to “Get out of my way-ah! / I’ll show you how I like it” and the unhindered attitude stamps a seal on her irreplaceable presence as an independent and energetic solo artist. 

강렬한 퍼즈 기타의 도입부와 함께 전개되는 R&B 팝-트랩 사운드와 함께 페달을 밟아 앞으로 나아가는 순간의 설렘과 벅찬 에너지를 표현해낸 곡. “Get out of my way-ah! / 보여줄게 how I like it”로 이어지는 코러스 파트의 직선적인 가사와 거침없는 애티튜드는 독립적이고도 에너지 넘치는 솔로 아티스트로서의 자신감과 그 누구도 대체할 수 없는 존재감을 각인시킨다.


[ CHUNG HA 'Bicycle' Credits ]

Lyrics by VINCENZO, CHUNG HA
Composed by Daniel Kim, Jeremy G (Future Sound), Dawn Elektra
Arranged by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO

Synthesizer Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO

Guitar Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Drum Performed by Daniel Kim, VINCENZO
Background Vocals by Emily Yeonseo Kim, Dawn Elektra
Vocal Directed by Fuxxy, VINCENZO

Recording Engineer Jung Eunkyeng at Ingrid Studio
Mixing Engineer  Yoon Wonkwon at Studio DDeepKick
Mastering Engineer Park Jung-Un at Honey Butter Studio

Join 9News for the latest in news and events that affect you in your local city, as well as news from across Australia and the world.

snippet.title: EX-ARMY na BF: Go ahead! Magsumbong ka sa mga TULFO!
snippet.description:
#ipaBITAGmo

Sadyang matapang at nakakatakot daw ang nagpapakilalang ex-military na ito na inireklamo ng kanyang ex-gf sa BITAG.

Marami na raw siyang tinodas kaya wala raw siyang pakialam kahit magsumbong pa ang kaniyang dating kasintahan sa BITAG.

Aniya, "Go ahead! Magsumbong ka! PAG-UMPUG-UMPUGIN KO PA ULO NG MGA TULFO!"

Kaya ang biktima, halos magpatiwakal na sa takot nang makausap ko.

Kilalanin ang kolokoy na ex-army daw na to! Gusto kong sukatin gaano katapang si Kumag at kung paano niya kami paguumpug-umpugin mag-u-utol!

SUBSCRIBE: https://bit.ly/2pzg3IJ

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Ruffa Gutierrez, BINUNYAG ang PAGUUSAP nilang MULI ng kanyang EX-HUSBAND na si Yilmas Bektas
snippet.description:
Inamin ng actress na si Ruffa Gutierrez na muli na silang nagkakausap ng masinsinan ng kanyang ex-husband na si Yilmas Bektas, isang Turkish Businessman.

Ikinasal sina Ruffa at Yilmaz, isang Turkish businessman, sa isang mala-fairytale wedding ceremony noong March 25, 2003.

Sinundan ito ng isang Muslim rites na ginanap sa Arcarkent, Istanbul, Turkey noong September 4, 2003.

Nagkaroon sila ng dalawang anak na babae ni Ruffa—sina Lorin, 17, at Venice, 16. Mayo 8, 2007 nila ini-announce ang kanilang paghihiwalay.

Panoorin ang pahayag ni Ruffa sa videong ito.

Disclaimer: I do not own any images in this video, no copyright infringement intended

snippet.title: Ben&Ben - Inevitable | Official Lyric Video (Vertical)
snippet.description:
Ben&Ben - Inevitable | Official Lyric Video (Vertical)

In collaboration with Smart Philippines in a campaign featuring Hyun Bin & Son Ye-Jin (BinJin).

Something about
the way you move
softened these eyes
and cracked the walls that hid my truth 

I don't know how
your fine mystery
knew all my doubts,
and what to say to set me free 

Inevitable
Even if I tried to fight it
No one ever crashed their tide in me
this hard 

Inevitable
We don't have to chase the feeling
Just let these moments happen 
and let go 

Then we'll know
Then we'll know 

Closer we flow,
a day at a time
but if you should leave
be on your way, I might be fine 

So take what you want
you know that I am yours
My cup is full
and so I want to fill you more 

Inevitable
Even if I tried to fight it
No one ever crashed their tide in me
this hard 

Inevitable
We don't have to chase the feeling
Just let these moments happen 
and let go 

Then we'll know
Then we'll know 
Then we'll know
Then we'll know 

What do I do?
What do I do?
What do I do?
When my truth is you

What do I do?
When my truth is you 

Inevitable
Even if I tried to fight it
No one ever crashed their tide in me
this hard 

Inevitable

and let go 

Then we'll know

snippet.title: FPJ's Ang Probinsyano | Episode 1315 (3/4) | February 18, 2021
snippet.description:
Determined to reclaim the reins of power and exact revenge on Lily (Lorna Tolentino), Renato (John Arcilla) takes his plan in full swing. As they find ways to save Teddy (Joel Torre) and Diana (Angel Aquino) from the First Lady's clutches, the members of Task Force Agila learn about the two's sufferings at the hands of their captors. Still grieving over Alyana's (Yassi Pressman) death, Lito (Richard Gutierrez) recalls how he became rich and powerful to give the former a better life.

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: Pamilya ng diumano'y nakapalitan ng sanggol ng mga Sifiata, nagsalita na!
snippet.description:
Aired (February 14, 2021): Marami ang tumutok sa kaso ng nangyaring baby switching sa isang ospital sa Rizal. At ngayon, ang Pamilya Mulleno-- ang pamilya na pinaniniwalaan nina Aprhil at Marvin na nakapalitan nila ng kanilang sanggol, nagsalita na! Panoorin ang kanilang kuwento sa video na ito.

Jim, together with Flo, Yana, Olan, and Ben’s college friends Francia and Bogs are looking for Ben’s whereabouts, but to no avail. He meets Val, a person who may or may not be an ally to his journey.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

About HBO Max: 
HBO Max is WarnerMedia’s direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMedia’s rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Award® winner Emma Stone (“La La Land”) stars in Disney’s “Cruella,” an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious – and notoriously fashionable – villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. “Cruella,” which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estella’s flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscar® winner Emma Thompson (“Howards End,” “Sense & Sensibility”). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
 
Disney’s “Cruella” is directed by Craig Gillespie (“I Tonya”) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (“Freaky Friday”), Marc Platt (“Mary Poppins Returns”) and Kristin Burr (“Christopher Robin”), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscar®- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (“Mad Max: Fury Road,” “A Room with a View”) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on “Cruella,” follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter: https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailers​
Hashtag: #Cruella

snippet.title: FPJ's Ang Probinsyano | Episode 1315 (4/4) | February 18, 2021
snippet.description:
Determined to reclaim the reins of power and exact revenge on Lily (Lorna Tolentino), Renato (John Arcilla) takes his plan in full swing. As they find ways to save Teddy (Joel Torre) and Diana (Angel Aquino) from the First Lady's clutches, the members of Task Force Agila learn about the two's sufferings at the hands of their captors. Still grieving over Alyana's (Yassi Pressman) death, Lito (Richard Gutierrez) recalls how he became rich and powerful to give the former a better life.

As they find ways to save Teddy (Joel Torre) and Diana (Angel Aquino) from the First Lady's clutches, the members of Task Force Agila learn about the two's sufferings at the hands of their captors. Still grieving over Alyana's (Yassi Pressman) death, Lito (Richard Gutierrez) recalls how he became rich and powerful to give the former a better life.

snippet.title: G League Ignite vs. Santa Cruz Warriors - Condensed Game
snippet.description:
The NBA G League is the NBA's official minor league. Fans can get a glimpse at the players, coaches and officials competing to ascend to the NBA's rank. With 40 percent of players on start-of-season NBA rosters boasting NBA G League experience when the 2018-19 season tipped off in October, the NBA G League YouTube Channel is the best place to see the future now.

The NBA G League consists of 27 teams for the 2018-19 season, all singly affiliated with an NBA franchise: Agua Caliente Clippers of Ontario (Los Angeles Clippers), Austin Spurs (San Antonio Spurs), Canton Charge (Cleveland Cavaliers), Capital City Go-Go (Washington Wizards), Delaware Blue Coats (Philadelphia 76ers), Erie BayHawks (Atlanta Hawks), Fort Wayne Mad Ants (Indiana Pacers), Grand Rapids Drive (Detroit Pistons), Greensboro Swarm (Charlotte Hornets), Iowa Wolves (Minnesota Timberwolves), Lakeland Magic (Orlando Magic), Long Island Nets (Brooklyn Nets), Maine Red Claws (Boston Celtics), Memphis Hustle (Memphis Grizzlies) Northern Arizona Suns (Phoenix Suns), Oklahoma City Blue (Oklahoma City Thunder), Raptors 905 (Toronto Raptors), Rio Grande Valley Vipers (Houston Rockets), Salt Lake City Stars (Utah Jazz), Santa Cruz Warriors (Golden State Warriors), Sioux Falls Skyforce (Miami Heat), South Bay Lakers (Los Angeles Lakers), Stockton Kings (Sacramento Kings), Texas Legends (Dallas Mavericks), Westchester Knicks (New York Knicks) and Wisconsin Herd (Milwaukee Bucks).

Visit us on the web: http://www.NBAGLeague.com
Like us on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/nbagleague
Follow us on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/nbagleague

Wish 107.5 is an all-hits FM radio station based in Quezon City, Philippines. However, innovation doesn’t stop in just delivering the coolest musical experience — Wish 107.5 has set the bar higher as it tapped the power of technology to let the Filipino artistry shine in the global stage. With its intensified investment in its digital platforms, it has transformed itself from being a local FM station to becoming a sought-after WISHclusive gateway to the world.

snippet.title: 500 Pounds SOLD in 2 Hours!! Why Folks are Dying for this STREET FOOD!!!
snippet.description:
🎥  SECOND CHANNEL!!! MORE BEFRS » http://bit.ly/2pQYjvM   
👕  BEFRS BANDANAS! GET YOURS TODAY » https://bit.ly/ShopBEFRS 
💗 SUPPORT OUR MISSION» http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon    
📷  CALVIN’S INSTAGRAM »  @fkndeliciousness 

Like our music? Enjoy a free 30-day of Epidemic Sound for the best royalty free music: http://share.epidemicsound.com/BEFRS 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
BONES

1. VY GARDEN
ADDRESS: 87H Lê Văn Duyệt, Binh Thanh District, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/VY-garden-122587309134787

🐖SPICY PORK NECK BONE: Slow cook the bones for 2 hours or more. Use the stock to make the broth that includes green chillies, scallion and lime juice. Finally pour the broth all over the bones and serve. 

💸 PRICE: 150.000 / $6.50 USD per ½ kg 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
2. LẨU RẮN BONA
ADDRESS: 909 Trần Xuân Soạn Street, District 7, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/Bona797979
 
🐍SNAKE SALAD: Clean the snake and remove intestines. Place the snake in a pressure cooker for 15 minutes. Separate the bones. Add julienned onion, julienned snake meat, condensed soy sauce, sugar, salt, MSG, pork bone powder, fish sauce, fresh chillies and lime juice in a bowl. Plate and top with peanuts. 

🐍SNAKE HOTPOT: After cooking the snake in the pressure cooker, de-bone and chop into small pieces then place it in a pot with the hotpot broth. Serve with vermicelli noodles and herbs.

🐍DEEP-FRIED SNAKE BONES: Season the snake bones with condensed soy sauce, MSG, fish sauce, soy sauce, chilly sauce and deep fry on low fire for 15 mins.

💸 PRICE: 950.000 / $41.2 USD per snake  
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
3. HỦ TÍU XÍ QUÁCH CHỊ PHỤNG
ADDRESS: 71Đ Bửu Đình Street, Ward 5, District 6, HCMC 
 
🐖PORK BONE MARROW: Assemble Hu tieu noodles, scallion, fried garlic, fried onion, minced pork and pork bone broth in a bowl and serve it with a separate bowl full of pork marrow.
 
💸 PRICE: 60.000 VND / $2.60 USD
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
4. BENARAS GARDENIA 
ADDRESS: 28 Trần Ngọc Diện Street, Thảo Điền Ward, District 2, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/BenarasIndianRestaurantLounge 

🐑 LAAL MAAS (MUTTON MARROW CURRY): Marinate the mutton marrow with ginger, garlic paste, salt, paprika powder and turmeric powder then leave it for 1 hour. | Curry: Add vegetable oil, bay leaf, star anise, cinamon, garlic cloves, minced garlic, chopped onions, turmeric powder, fresh tomato puree, salt, paprika coriander powder, cumin powder and inhouse mixed powder in a pot for five minutes. Add the marinated mutton bones in the curry base and cook for 30 minutes. Put the combination in the pressure cooker and cook for 20 minutes to soften the mutton meat. Plate & serve with garlic naan. 
 
💸 PRICE: 249.000 VND / 10.79 USD 
 
#BestEverBoneTour #BestEverFoodReviewShow #BEFRS
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Hey, I’m Sonny! I’m from the US but currently call Vietnam home. I’ve been living in Asia for 10 years and started making food and travel videos to document my experiences. I travel to different parts of the world, hunting down and documenting the most unique food each country has to offer. 

If you see any factual food errors in my videos, please feel free to politely let me know in the comments. I'm a huge fan of trying different, interesting foods in each country. My show is from a Western point of view, but more importantly, MY point of view. It is not meant to offend any person or culture.

Lyrics:
I’m on an island
Even when you’re close
Can’t take the silence
I’d rather be alone
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won’t be a burden if we both don’t hold a grudge
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

Now you’re holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don’t give me that look just say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.description:

snippet.title: FRONTLINER NA DOKTORA, NAGPA-TULFO!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Pangulong Duterte Nagluluksa sa Pagpanaw ni Bro. Eli Soriano
snippet.description:
Nagluluksa ngayon ang pamilya, mga miyembro at lahat ng nagmamahal kay Brother Eli Soriano ang overall servant ng Church Of God International. Pumanaw na kase ang Televangelist sa edad na 73. Kinumpirma ito mismo ng official facebook page ng Ang Dating Daant at Members of the Church Of God International.

Maging si Pangulong Rodrigo Duterte ay nagulat sa pagpanaw ni Bro. Eli. Isang pahayag ang ibinigay nito sa publiko at sa mga mahal sa buhay ng namatay na mangangaral.

Si Brother Eli ang host ng longest running religious show na Ang Dating Daan na sa kasalukuyan ay napapanood na sa mahigit pitumpung bansa sa pamamagitan ng ibat ibang wika.

Mas nakilala siya sa programang Itanong Mo Kay Soriano Biblia ang Sasagot kung saan pinupuna at itinatama niya ang mga maling aral ng ibang mga pastor.

snippet.title: Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks！明日除夕，挂灯笼、贴对联、备好年货过大年啦！丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!
一年又到头啦！
年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！
给所有没回家就地过年的小伙伴们大大的拥抱
我相信，生生不息的希望和好运
一定会和2021一起到来

After long years of serving in the forces former major Andrey Shamanov tries to live usual life. But when his ex-colleagues need his help even his beloved Nastya can’t make him refuse a dangerous missionto investigate a cause of death of SMU group, who were undergoing drill in the mountains where gang of smugglers were hiding. While working on this case Andrey will face severe trials as the criminals kidnap his beloved and try to blackmail him. Shamanov decides to take the criminals by storm and saves Nastya, releasing several hostages. But the criminals are not going to let Andrey and witnesses leave the secret base…

https://news.cgtn.com/news/2021-02-14/At-least-100-injured-after-M7-3-quake-strikes-off-NE-Japan-XS06q6E5zi/index.html

At least 100 people were injured after a 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck off Japan's northeastern Fukushima Prefecture at 11:08 p.m. local time (1408 GMT) on Saturday, according to the Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA). A tsunami warning has not been issued so far. Tremors were also felt in Tokyo, according to a CGTN reporter in Japan. #Japan #Earthquake

snippet.title: Leche Flan Banana Cake .. Can This Be The Next Viral Recipe?
snippet.description:
The leche nana, a.k.a the next viral food trend? Here's how to make it at home!

Jump to:
Introduction (00:00)
Banana Cake (01:55)
Leche Flan (03:16)


Recipe:
For our banana cake you’ll need: 
- 1 ½ cup flour
- 1 cup packed brown sugar
- ½ tsp baking powder
- 1 tsp baking soda
- 1/2 tsp kosher salt
- 1/2 tsp cinnamon
- 130g browned butter
- 2 large eggs
- 1 ½ cup overripe bananas, mashed and measured. 
- ½ cup sour cream
- 1 tsp vanilla extract
--
1. Mix all the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, kosher salt, cinnamon. 
2. Mash the bananas and mix with brown sugar, browned butter, 2 egg yolks beated, sour cream and vanilla extract. 
3. Fold intro 2 egg whites beaten into soft peaks. 
--
For the leche flan, you’ll need:
- 10 egg yolks
- 340ml evaporated milk
- 285ml  sweetened condensed milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
- 1 tsp lime zest
- 10 tablespoons granulated sugar

INSTRUCTIONS
1.  Start by placing all the sugar in your baking pan. I’m using a 9x3. Run this on your stove, slowly melting all of the sugar and making sure to not let it go too far. The most important thing is that the sugar granules are completely dissolve. After that, it’s really your choice. The darker it is, the more bitter it will become. Take it off, right before it’s the color you want it to be. Let this cool completely. 
2.  Place the egg yolks in a bowl, and slowly beat them with a fork. During this whole process, if you want a perfect, meaning no lump leche flan, you have to beat this really slowly, to make sure that no bubbles form. Add in your milks, vanilla extra and zest. If you want something really smooth. Pass this through a strainer. 
Put it together
1.  Place your leche flan mix in the baking dish. 
2.  Top slowly with banana mix. 
3.  160°C/320°F for about 45 minutes, in a bain marie, meaning in a tray filled with boiling water, reaching halfway up our cake pan. 
4.  Take out when cake reaches internal temp of 200F or a stick comes out clean.

localized.title: Leche Flan Banana Cake .. Can This Be The Next Viral Recipe?
localized.description:
The leche nana, a.k.a the next viral food trend? Here's how to make it at home!

Jump to:
Introduction (00:00)
Banana Cake (01:55)
Leche Flan (03:16)


Recipe:
For our banana cake you’ll need: 
- 1 ½ cup flour
- 1 cup packed brown sugar
- ½ tsp baking powder
- 1 tsp baking soda
- 1/2 tsp kosher salt
- 1/2 tsp cinnamon
- 130g browned butter
- 2 large eggs
- 1 ½ cup overripe bananas, mashed and measured. 
- ½ cup sour cream
- 1 tsp vanilla extract
--
1. Mix all the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, kosher salt, cinnamon. 
2. Mash the bananas and mix with brown sugar, browned butter, 2 egg yolks beated, sour cream and vanilla extract. 
3. Fold intro 2 egg whites beaten into soft peaks. 
--
For the leche flan, you’ll need:
- 10 egg yolks
- 340ml evaporated milk
- 285ml  sweetened condensed milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
- 1 tsp lime zest
- 10 tablespoons granulated sugar

INSTRUCTIONS
1.  Start by placing all the sugar in your baking pan. I’m using a 9x3. Run this on your stove, slowly melting all of the sugar and making sure to not let it go too far. The most important thing is that the sugar granules are completely dissolve. After that, it’s really your choice. The darker it is, the more bitter it will become. Take it off, right before it’s the color you want it to be. Let this cool completely. 
2.  Place the egg yolks in a bowl, and slowly beat them with a fork. During this whole process, if you want a perfect, meaning no lump leche flan, you have to beat this really slowly, to make sure that no bubbles form. Add in your milks, vanilla extra and zest. If you want something really smooth. Pass this through a strainer. 
Put it together
1.  Place your leche flan mix in the baking dish. 
2.  Top slowly with banana mix. 
3.  160°C/320°F for about 45 minutes, in a bain marie, meaning in a tray filled with boiling water, reaching halfway up our cake pan. 
4.  Take out when cake reaches internal temp of 200F or a stick comes out clean.

snippet.title: Dramatic Footage as Parts of Northeastern Japan are Rocked by Powerful Earthquake
snippet.description:
Parts of northeastern Japan have been struck by a powerful earthquake.

The 7.3 magnitude tremor shook homes and buildings in Fukushima, Miyagi and surrounding parts.

It's ten years since a devastating quake hit the same area, triggering a tsunami and a meltdown at a nuclear power plant.

snippet.title: Japan earthquake:  Powerful 7 magnitude quake strikes off coast of Fukushima
snippet.description:
A powerful 7.1 magnitude earthquake has hit off the coast of Fukushima, weeks before the anniversary of a nuclear disaster at the same location.

At least 30 people were injured in the quake, which shook buildings in the capital Tokyo when it hit on Saturday, shortly after 11pm local time.

snippet.title: eng) LILI's FILM 'The Movie' Reaction | LISA DANCE PERFORMANCE | 리사 댄스 필름 리액션 | Korean Fanboy | J2N
snippet.description:
All Eng subs are Available💡  한글 자막 이용가능합니다💡

[J2NLog] Now that she's back with the title 'The Movie' instead of the film number 5, we've tried LILI's FILM reaction, which was more story-like and complete.🔥 The more I watch it, the more I get respectful of Lisa's works, the more I think 'Can I watch it for free?' 😂 Please enjoy today's video!

[J2NLog] 이번에는 필름 넘버 5가 아닌 'The Movie'라는 타이틀을 가지고 돌아온 만큼 더욱 스토리와 완성도 있었던 LILI's FILM 리액션을 해보았습니다🔥 진짜 진짜 볼수록 리스펙이 가득 생기는 리사님의 작품들,, 이걸 공짜로 봐도 되는지 생각이 든답니다😂 오늘 영상도 재밌게 즐겨주세요!

J2N Commentary | 
I'm so thankful that we can find other aspects of Lisa through the content called LiLi’s Film. I recently watched BLACKPINK's online concert, where she showed relaxed and pop star-like solo performance with Say So. And It was so nice to see her other powerful and cool performance this time😭

리리필름이라는 콘텐츠를 통해 리사의 또다른 모습들을 많이 발견할 수 있어 너무 감사한 것 같아요! 또 최근에 블랙핑크 온라인 콘서트를 시청했는데 그때의 여유 있고 팝스타 같은 모습의 리사 ‘Say So’ 솔로 무대와는 멋지고 강렬한 모습을 볼 수 있어 그 점도 너무 좋았습니다😭

Anica Commentary | 
In previous Lilifilm videos, I felt like there was an central emphasis on the choreography itself; however, in this video, I was blown away by how a story was also incorporated, hence the title “The MOVIE”. I could feel the plot and I liked how we could as an audience enjoy that part as well. Also, because of COVID-19, we have to constantly wear masks, but I felt like in this film Lisa showed that can’t stop me- COVID-19 cannot stop me! That strongly stood out and made Lisa and her dancing look even more powerful.👍🏻

이전의 리리필름 작품에서는 안무에 강점을 준 느낌이 강했는데 이번 ‘The Movie’ 영상에서는 안무와 함께 서사가 어떻게 진행되는지도 볼 수 있었던 것 같아요. 그래서 시청자 입장에서 이야기를 느끼며 영상을 감상할 수 있었습니다ㅎㅎ 그리고 코로나 상황으로 인해 지속적으로 마스크를 사용하고 있는데 이 영상 속에서 마치 코로나도 나(리사)를 멈출 수 없다!는 에너지가 파워풀한 안무를 통해 느껴졌던 것 같습니다ㅎㅎ👍🏻

| LiLi's Film 4 Reaction 👉🏻 https://youtu.be/hY30tAqnQ14
| LiLi's Film 3 Reaction 👉🏻 https://youtu.be/nBdrOr9AApo

리리필름이라는 콘텐츠를 통해 리사의 또다른 모습들을 많이 발견할 수 있어 너무 감사한 것 같아요! 또 최근에 블랙핑크 온라인 콘서트를 시청했는데 그때의 여유 있고 팝스타 같은 모습의 리사 ‘Say So’ 솔로 무대와는 멋지고 강렬한 모습을 볼 수 있어 그 점도 너무 좋았습니다😭

Anica Commentary | 
In previous Lilifilm videos, I felt like there was an central emphasis on the choreography itself; however, in this video, I was blown away by how a story was also incorporated, hence the title “The MOVIE”. I could feel the plot and I liked how we could as an audience enjoy that part as well. Also, because of COVID-19, we have to constantly wear masks, but I felt like in this film Lisa showed that can’t stop me- COVID-19 cannot stop me! That strongly stood out and made Lisa and her dancing look even more powerful.👍🏻

이전의 리리필름 작품에서는 안무에 강점을 준 느낌이 강했는데 이번 ‘The Movie’ 영상에서는 안무와 함께 서사가 어떻게 진행되는지도 볼 수 있었던 것 같아요. 그래서 시청자 입장에서 이야기를 느끼며 영상을 감상할 수 있었습니다ㅎㅎ 그리고 코로나 상황으로 인해 지속적으로 마스크를 사용하고 있는데 이 영상 속에서 마치 코로나도 나(리사)를 멈출 수 없다!는 에너지가 파워풀한 안무를 통해 느껴졌던 것 같습니다ㅎㅎ👍🏻

| LiLi's Film 4 Reaction 👉🏻 https://youtu.be/hY30tAqnQ14
| LiLi's Film 3 Reaction 👉🏻 https://youtu.be/nBdrOr9AApo

| Contact |
https://www.instagram.com/j2n_insta/
E-mail : j2nlee2@gmail.com

snippet.title: TAIWANESE, IPINA-TULFO ANG MMDA!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: コブクロ 「卒業 (Special Version) [with SANA]」
snippet.description:
コブクロ「卒業」新MUSIC VIDEOにTWICEのSANAが出演！！ 

SANA（TWICE）が日本のアーティストのミュージックビデオ作品に参加するのはデビューしてから初めての事。 

2020年3月にリリースしたコブクロの「卒業」。 
今年、「卒業」という楽曲を学生だけでなく、かつて「卒業生」だったすべての人々に聞いてもらうべく“大人が振り返る卒業”をテーマに「卒業」MVにSANA（TWICE）を迎え、新たに制作する事となった。 
SANA（TWICE）自身、TWICEの活動のため大阪から韓国へと拠点を移し、活躍の日々を送っているが、そこには夢を叶えるために希望溢れた未来へと向かったストーリーがあり、大人になっても振り返ることのできる築き上げた思い出が、支えとなり、当時と繋ぐ架け橋となって今作「卒業」が新しい道へと進めるよう背中を後押ししてくれる、そんな作品だったからこそ出演へと至った。
コブクロ「卒業 (Special Version) [with SANA]」の前半シーンでは液晶ビジョンに「大阪の街」が映し出される。 思い出が溢れた街並みを背に歩いていくと、懐かしさからか優しい笑顔がSANA（TWICE）から溢れる。
SANA（TWICE）は「大阪の馴染みある場所を見ると、当時の思い出を振り返る事が出来る」と話すと、シーンは「韓国の街」へと移っていく、するとSANA（TWICE）からは幼さが消え、大人びた表情へと変わっていくように映る。
２つの背景をストーリーにし、液晶ビジョンには色鮮やかな桜が映し出され、SANA（TWICE）の周りを桜の花びらが舞い散る。
日本のアーティストのミュージックビデオ初参加となったSANA（TWICE）は「コブクロさんの世界観を感じる事が出来てすごく楽しかったです。」と話した。 

クロスオーバーするそれぞれの背景には、「卒業」に込められた想いも詰まり今作のテーマでもある“大人が振り返る卒業”を表現した作品へ仕上がった。 


▽コブクロ 公式サイト
http://kobukuro.com/

▽コブクロ公式Twitter
https://twitter.com/TeamKobukuro

▽コブクロ公式LINE

snippet.title: F.HERO Ft. BRIGHT VACHIRAWIT (Prod. By NINO) - Sad Movie [Official MV]
snippet.description:
F.HERO Ft. BRIGHT VACHIRAWIT (Prod. By NINO) - Sad Movie [Official MV]

Executive Producer: F.HERO
Producer: NINO

Lyrics : F.HERO, AMP Achariya Dulyapaiboon
Music : AMP Achariya Dulyapaiboon
Arranged : NINO
Vocal : Vachirawit Chivaaree 
Guitar : Narurthai Samattanawin
Keyboard : Kavin Siripatarakhun
Chorus : AMP Achariya Dulyapaiboon

Recording Engineer: Arjampol Chandravuth
Recording at Studio 28 Recording Studio, BKK

Mixed by: NINO @ NINO TRAP HOUSE STUDIO
Mastered by NINO @ NINO TRAP HOUSE STUDIO

Record Label: High Cloud Entertainment 
.

Music Video 
Director : Naratip Chainarong
Producer  : Mink Sirada 
Director of Photography : Kritsada Nakagate
Editor : Natthapon Sukhuprakan
Colorist : Phiradon Witcharonasorn
.

Digital Released:
https://backl.ink/144565232

.

Lyrics:

Hook1
มีแต่ฉากเดิมๆทุกที ทุกที 
ซ้ำไปซ้ำมาอย่างนี้ 
ไม่เคยมี Love Scene มีแต่ Sad Scene
(อะไรวะเรื่องนี้)
รับบทคนแพ้ทุกที ทุกที 
ซ้ำไปซ้ำมาอย่างนี้
ไม่เคยมี Love Scene มีแต่ Sad Scene
My Sad Movie 

Verse1 
(Bright) เหมือนเดิม มีแต่พล๊อตเดิม 
ไม่ว่ารักใคร ก็มีแต่ซ้ำเติม
ดราม่ากว่านี้มีอีกไหม
ใครๆ ก็คอยจะทำร้าย
ก็คล้าย ว่าเรามันดวงตก
กี่ครั้ง ก็ต้องน้ำตาตก 
ฟ้าหลังฝนไม่เห็นจะมีจริง 
หนังเรื่องนี้คงไม่ Happy Ending

(F.HERO) ไอ้ตอนไปแคสท์โมเดลลิ่งก็บอกว่าแคสท์บทพระเอก
รับบทหนังรักหวานซึ้งประมาณญาญ่ากับณเดชน์
แต่พอรักสั่งแอคชั่น แล้วกามเทพตีสเลท
เอ้าไหงกลายเป็นหนัง Sad เปลี่ยนจากหน้ามือเป็นมะเหงก
อยากจะเบรกกองให้หมด แล้วเรียกคนเขียนมาแก้บท
นี่มันหนังรักอะไรกันวะทำไมตอนจบมันแย่หมด
รักใครก็แพ้หมด รับบทช้ำไปและช้ำมา
ขนาดป๊อปคอร์นหน้าโรงหนังยังเป็นป๊อปคอร์นรสน้ำตา

Pre Hook
พอเหอะความเหงา พอเหอะความเศร้า
อยากมีความรักกับเขาซักที

Hook2
มีแต่ฉากเดิมๆทุกที ทุกที 
ซ้ำไปซ้ำมาอย่างนี้ 
ไม่เคยมี Love Scene มีแต่ Sad Scene
(อะไรวะเรื่องนี้)
รับบทคนแพ้ทุกที ทุกที 
ทำไมต้องเป็นอย่างนี้
จะมีมั้ย Love Scene ไม่เอาละ Sad Scene
My Sad Movie 

Verse2
คงเดินออกโรงไปละถ้าหากว่าเกิดเป็นคนดู (Damn!)
น้ำตาท่วมจอเป็นเราก็คงไม่ทนดู
ถ้าได้สมหวังเหมือน Coffee Prince ของกงยู
ฉันคงกระโดดโลดเต้นอย่างกับพี่น้อยวงพรู
แต่พอเอ่ยบงชูร์ แล้วเค้าก็บอกว่าลาก่อน
เป็นพระรองในซีรี่ส์ที่พระเอกเค้ามาก่อน
ต่อให้ทุ่มเทไปเต็มที่สุดท้ายก็มีน้ำตาก่อน
เพราะหน้าเรา Comedy เป็นแค่ตลกปัญญาอ่อน
ละครน้ำเน่าดาวพระศุกร์ต้องอาย
เหมือนกับโกโบริที่ตอนจบต้องตาย
บทไม่สบายอยากมีมือแตะต้องกาย
อยากให้เธอเหลียวมองสงสัยต้องวาย
ก็ยังข้องใจ มองใครต่อใครเขารับบทนำใน Paradise
ไอ้เราดันได้รับบทเป็นแค่คนจนใน Parasite
อยากจะได้ดอกกุหลาบทำไมได้รับแต่ Dynamite
ถ้าทำ Soundtrack ให้หนังเรื่องนี้เราควรจะร้องยังไงอ่ะไบร์ท ไหนร้องซิ

Pre Hook
พอเหอะความเหงา พอเหอะความเศร้า
อยากมีความรักกับเขาซักที 

Hook2
มีแต่ฉากเดิมๆทุกที ทุกที 
ซ้ำไปซ้ำมาอย่างนี้ 
ไม่เคยมี Love Scene มีแต่ Sad Scene
(อะไรวะเรื่องนี้)
รับบทคนแพ้ทุกที ทุกที 
ทำไมต้องเป็นอย่างนี้
จะมีมั้ย Love Scene ไม่เอาละ Sad Scene
My Sad Movie 

Outtro
จมน้ำตาอย่างกับเรื่อง The Classic
รักปลอมๆอย่างกับเป็นพลาสติก
พล๊อตอย่างกับยิมนาสติก
ดราม่ากว่าแจ๊ค ดอว์สันในเรื่องไททานิค
หนังมันเศร้าพูดไปแล้วก็เจ็บจี๊ด
อยากมีใครซักคนไม่ต้องมีเยอะถึงเจ็ดกิ๊ก
ถ้าเล่าความหลังมันต้องสปอยล์ถึง 7 Weeks
เพราะหนังของเรามันเศร้า กว่ารวมหนัง Sad ทั้ง Netflix

localized.description:
F.HERO Ft. BRIGHT VACHIRAWIT (Prod. By NINO) - Sad Movie [Official MV]

Executive Producer: F.HERO
Producer: NINO

.

Lyrics:

Hook1
มีแต่ฉากเดิมๆทุกที ทุกที

ไม่เคยมี Love Scene มีแต่ Sad Scene
My Sad Movie 

Verse1 
(Bright) เหมือนเดิม มีแต่พล๊อตเดิม 
ไม่ว่ารักใคร ก็มีแต่ซ้ำเติม
ดราม่ากว่านี้มีอีกไหม
ใครๆ ก็คอยจะทำร้าย
ก็คล้าย ว่าเรามันดวงตก
กี่ครั้ง ก็ต้องน้ำตาตก 
ฟ้าหลังฝนไม่เห็นจะมีจริง 
หนังเรื่องนี้คงไม่ Happy Ending

(F.HERO) ไอ้ตอนไปแคสท์โมเดลลิ่งก็บอกว่าแคสท์บทพระเอก
รับบทหนังรักหวานซึ้งประมาณญาญ่ากับณเดชน์
แต่พอรักสั่งแอคชั่น แล้วกามเทพตีสเลท
เอ้าไหงกลายเป็นหนัง Sad เปลี่ยนจากหน้ามือเป็นมะเหงก
อยากจะเบรกกองให้หมด แล้วเรียกคนเขียนมาแก้บท
นี่มันหนังรักอะไรกันวะทำไมตอนจบมันแย่หมด
รักใครก็แพ้หมด รับบทช้ำไปและช้ำมา
ขนาดป๊อปคอร์นหน้าโรงหนังยังเป็นป๊อปคอร์นรสน้ำตา

น้ำตาท่วมจอเป็นเราก็คงไม่ทนดู

ฉันคงกระโดดโลดเต้นอย่างกับพี่น้อยวงพรู
แต่พอเอ่ยบงชูร์ แล้วเค้าก็บอกว่าลาก่อน

snippet.title: Una COLOMBIANA y un URUGUAYO arrasan con su BAILE | Audiciones 3 | Got Talent España 2021
snippet.description:
La sexta temporada de 'Got Talent España' te va a dejar con la boca abierta con centenares de sorprendentes y emocionantes actuaciones que serán valoradas por un divertido y exigente jurado. Risto Mejide, la cantante Edurne y el humorista Dani Martínez repiten en la mesa para valorar todos los números y decidir quién debe pasar o no a la siguiente fase del talent show de Telecinco, que vuelve más fuerte que nunca. 

No son pocos los participantes que lucharán esta vez por cumplir su sueño sobre el escenario del programa después de un confinamiento que lo cambió todo y que demostró que hay mucho talento por descubrir todavía en nuestro país. Muchas de esas historias marcan estas actuaciones con las que es imposible no emocionarse ni vibrar. 

Cantantes con temas que te van a poner la piel de gallina, espectaculares números grupales de baile que te dejarán con la boca abierta, sorprendentes trucos de magia imposibles de descubrir, humoristas con los que no pararemos de reír, niños con talentos inimaginables o deportistas que convertirán su disciplina en un verdadero talento. Todos forman parte de esta edición del talent show y todos lucharán por llevarse el preciado Pase de Oro del jurado y de Santi Millán; aunque lograrlo no será nada fácil. 

Prepárate para emocionarte, para reír como nunca y para vibrar con estos números. Prepárate para acompañar a nuestros participantes en el que será el viaje más especial de sus vidas. ¿Te unes? 

¡Bienvenidos al canal oficial de ‘Got Talent España’! 

► Si estás en España podrás acceder a los mejores clips en http://www.telecinco.es/gottalent/ y al programa completo en http://www.mitele.es/programas-tv/got-talent/ 

► ¡No te pierdas los últimos vídeos de ‘Got Talent España’! 
Suscríbete al canal de YouTube http://bit.ly/GOTTALENT_SPAIN

en.title: A COLOMBIAN and a URUGUAYAN sweep their dance | Auditions 3 | Spain's Got Talent 2021
en.description:
The sixth season of ‘Got Talent Spain’ will surprise you with hundreds of exciting and fun performances that will be judged by a fun and demanding jury. Risto Mejide, the singer Edurne and the humorist Dani Martínez repeat on the program to assess all the numbers and decide who should or shouldn’t go to the next stage of the selection of the Telecinco talent show, which returns stronger than ever. 

There are many participants who will fight to fulfill their dream on the stage of the show after a confinement that has changed everything and which it as shown that there is still a lot of talent to discover. Many of those stories are important in these performances that it is impossible not to get excited about. 

Singer with songs that you will love, spectacular group dance numbers that will impress you, surprising magic tricks that are impossible to discover, comedians with whom you will not stop laughing, children with unimaginable talents or athletes who turn their discipline into a talent. They are part of this edition of the talent show and everyone will fight to win the Golden Pass of the jury and Santi Millán. But getting it will not be easy. 

Get ready to get excited, to laugh like never before and to vibrate with these numbers. Get ready to accompany our participant on what will be the most special trip of their lives. You join?

Welcome to the official channel of ‘Got Talent Spain’!

► If you are in Spain, you can access the best clis at http://www.telecinco.es/gottalent/ and the full show at http://www.mitele.es/programas-tv/got-talent/ 

► ¡Don’t miss the latest ‘Got Talent Spain’ videos! 
Suscribe to the YouTube cannel http://bit.ly/GOTTALENT_SPAIN

snippet.title: G League Ignite vs. Raptors 905 - Condensed Game
snippet.description:
The NBA G League is the NBA's official minor league. Fans can get a glimpse at the players, coaches and officials competing to ascend to the NBA's rank. With 40 percent of players on start-of-season NBA rosters boasting NBA G League experience when the 2018-19 season tipped off in October, the NBA G League YouTube Channel is the best place to see the future now.

The NBA G League consists of 27 teams for the 2018-19 season, all singly affiliated with an NBA franchise: Agua Caliente Clippers of Ontario (Los Angeles Clippers), Austin Spurs (San Antonio Spurs), Canton Charge (Cleveland Cavaliers), Capital City Go-Go (Washington Wizards), Delaware Blue Coats (Philadelphia 76ers), Erie BayHawks (Atlanta Hawks), Fort Wayne Mad Ants (Indiana Pacers), Grand Rapids Drive (Detroit Pistons), Greensboro Swarm (Charlotte Hornets), Iowa Wolves (Minnesota Timberwolves), Lakeland Magic (Orlando Magic), Long Island Nets (Brooklyn Nets), Maine Red Claws (Boston Celtics), Memphis Hustle (Memphis Grizzlies) Northern Arizona Suns (Phoenix Suns), Oklahoma City Blue (Oklahoma City Thunder), Raptors 905 (Toronto Raptors), Rio Grande Valley Vipers (Houston Rockets), Salt Lake City Stars (Utah Jazz), Santa Cruz Warriors (Golden State Warriors), Sioux Falls Skyforce (Miami Heat), South Bay Lakers (Los Angeles Lakers), Stockton Kings (Sacramento Kings), Texas Legends (Dallas Mavericks), Westchester Knicks (New York Knicks) and Wisconsin Herd (Milwaukee Bucks).

snippet.title: Japan Hit by 7.1-Magnitude Earthquake Off Fukushima
snippet.description:
Prime Minister Yoshihide Suga ordered an immediate assessment of damage, Chief Cabinet Secretary Katsunobu Kato told reporters. Kato didn’t take any questions from reporters.

At least six people suffered injuries in Fukushima and neighboring Miyagi prefecture, according to Kyodo News.

A magnitude 7.1 earthquake hit off Fukushima prefecture in northeastern Japan late Saturday night, leaving at least several injured and causing widespread power outages in the region.

There was no threat of a tsunami from the quake. About 830,000 households were hit by blackouts, according to Tokyo Electric Power Co., also known as Tepco.

The epicenter of the quake was off the coast of Fukushima, about 220 kilometers (135 miles) north of Tokyo, the Japan Meteorological Agency said. The strong quake was felt widely across Japan, including shaking of four on Japan’s seven-point scale in the capital Tokyo.

The earthquake occurred less than a month before the 10-year anniversary of the 2011 earthquake and tsunami that left about 19,000 people dead or missing. The tsunami hit the Fukushima Dai-ichi nuclear plant, leading to a meltdown at three nuclear units.

No abnormalities were found at the nuclear plants in Fukushima, Tepco said.

Buildings in central Fukushima city did not appear to have suffered any major structural damage, according to television footage.

Subscribe to our YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/2TwO8Gm

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore.

localized.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
localized.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: Putragis na Pulis! Resibo lang nawala, Delivery Boy Tinorture, Naihi sa sakit!
snippet.description:
#ipaBITAGmo

Dahil lang sa nawawalang resibo, pinosasan, pinaluhod at binugbog hanggang sa maihi sa sakit ang isang delivery boy.

Ang nasa likod, ang kaniyang among pulis na may-ari ng tindahan ng LPG. 

Ang hinayupak, mismong sa loob ng presinto tinorture ang pobre!

Nadiskubre pa ng BITAG, ang tindahan ng LPG ng les-pu, hindi otorisado, walang lisensiya - iligal!

Panoorin ang nakakaawang sinapit ng delivery boy na ito sa kamay ng isang Pulis ng Teresa, Rizal.


SUBSCRIBE: https://bit.ly/2pzg3IJ
BITAG Live Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bitagbentulfojournalist/
BMN Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bitagmultimedianetwork/

snippet.title: Robbers meet different fates after hitting courier service in Quezon City | 24 Oras
snippet.description:
A suspect was killed, another escaped and a third one was arrested after they robbed a branch of a courier service in Quezon City. According to Marisol Abdurahman’s report on “24 Oras” on Wednesday, the robbery led to an encounter with the police and resulted in the death of one of the suspects.

CCTV footage showed that police chased the suspects after the robbery of the LBC branch on Matalino Street. One of the suspects opened fire prompting the police to shoot back, killing him. Another escaped. Police arrested one of them, Leonardo Abando, and recovered P50,000 of the loot.

24 Oras is GMA Network’s flagship newscast, anchored by Mike Enriquez, Mel Tiangco and Vicky Morales. It airs on GMA-7 Mondays to Fridays at 6:30 PM (PHL Time) and on weekends at 6:00 PM. For more videos from 24 Oras, visit http://www.gmanetwork.com/24oras.

For the latest updates about the COVID-19 pandemic (coronavirus disease 2019), click this link: https://www.gmanetwork.com/news/covid-19/

You can watch 24 Oras and other Kapuso programs overseas on GMA Pinoy TV. Visit https://www.gmanetwork.com/international to subscribe.

GMA promotes healthy debate and conversation online. Any abusive language that does not facilitate productive discourse will be blocked from this post.

snippet.title: VICE MAYOR, SINARADO ANG DAGAT DAHIL BINILI NIYA RAW ITO?
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: LILI’s FILM [The Movie] REACTION
snippet.description:
Here we go again.... Am I complaining? absolutely not! It's just that's she's making it hard for me to stay loyal seriously?! She makes it look so easy and she know exactly what she's doing and that's what makes her so damn powerful! The more tomboy side of her and the more femme fatale sexy side of her are so perfectly balanced here! She's so freaking amazing because she's so into it, she's selling the whole thing incredibly well! The suit is hot but the thigh high boots?!!!!! UGH !!! 

→ Watch the MV here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vtRJZEHdu8M

snippet.title: Thurman vs Porter FULL FIGHT: June 25, 2016 - PBC on Showtime
snippet.description:
Prizefighting returned to CBS on Saturday, June 25, 2016, with a Fight of the Year candidate as undefeated welterweight world champion Keith Thurman edged former world champion Shawn Porter in a close but unanimous decision scored 115-113 by all three ringside judges.

The 12,718 fans in attendance at Barclays Center in Brooklyn and the viewers across the U.S. watching the first primetime boxing event on CBS since Muhammed Ali-Leon Spinks in 1978 were treated to a slugfest between two of the brightest stars in boxing’s glamour division. 

Thurman (27-0, 22 KOs) and Porter (26-2-1, 16 KOs) combined to throw over 1200 punches in the SHOWTIME CHAMPIONSHIP BOXING on CBS event, presented by Premier Boxing Champions.  The marquee showdown was a story of accuracy vs. activity, as Thurman landed 50 percent of his power shots, compared to 38 percent for Porter, and 44 percent of his total punches compared to just 36 percent for the challenger.  While Thurman landed at a higher percentage, Porter was the busier fighter, throwing over 100 more punches across 12 rounds. 

“One Time” and “Showtime” delivered as advertised, with the powerful sharpshooter buckling Porter multiple times, while the swarming and smothering Porter barreled forward to bully Thurman into the ropes.  And while there were no knockdowns, the back-and-forth blockbuster never lacked action and culminated in a standing ovation in the second-highest attended boxing event in Barclays Center history.

"I want to thank Shawn Porter for a tremendous fight.  He's a great warrior,” said Thurman.  “Defense is the key to victory.  He smothers his punches a lot and makes it difficult for the judges to score.  I was able to rock him with clear, effective blows and I believe that was the difference today.

“I would give him a rematch. It was great fight.  He was a great opponent.  Everyone was saying would he be my toughest opponent to date.  I wasn’t able to drop him but I did buckle him a few times.”

The former world champion Porter, a perennial underdog but consummate gentleman, didn’t complain about being on the losing end of his second close decision in a title bout.  

“We worked hard, Keith is a great champion,” Porter said. “My dad says to keep your head up.  I think I won the fight, but I'm satisfied because the competitor came out tonight.

"We need that rematch.  I know the fans want that rematch.  If he gives me another chance, I'm going to work hard in the ring and leave with his title."

#ThurmanvsPorter #ShawnPorter #KeithThurman

Visit PremierBoxingChampions.com for info.

http://pbcham.ps/FightAlerts

ABOUT CG5
--------------------
CG5 is a music producer creating original songs, and remixing songs from television shows, video games, and more! Subscribe for music all the time! 

Logo Intro by Eastah ▶  https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1VzCDhg2XgtQbO9XwPcqIQ

LYRICS:

I’m waking up,
breathing in clean air,
What a day, yeah,
What a sunny, funny day.
I feel so high, I can’t deny
A little better than okay,
Nowhere to go.
I shoot for stars, I’m Galileo.
Pack your bags and don’t be late.
The scenery flies before my eyes,
Don’t you dream of home, cuz it’ll have to wait.

It’s good to be alive,
It’s good to be alive,
I’m happy to survive,
So good.

Can’t kill my la-di-da vibe,
Suffocate my feelin’ alright,
Or asphyxiate my hype.
My bridges burned, no stone unturned.
It’s a relations’ massacre.
My new absolution,
My new lease on life has just begun today.
I ain’t worried ‘bout the fakes, or the bodies in my wake.
Baby, I’m a firework, like Pompeii.

It’s good to be alive,
It’s good to be alive,
I’m happy to survive,
So, so good.

The saints and angels sing,
Choir of the bells chime, ring ring ring.
I feel alive, 
So alive!

It’s good to be alive,
It’s good to be alive,
I’m happy to survive,
So, so good.

It's good!
So good!
It's good!
So good!

snippet.title: 'I’m not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

snippet.title: Ang encounter ni Carmina Villarroel sa walang-respetong aktres at kay Julia Montes
snippet.description:
Bago matapos ang kanyang PEP Live interview, sumabak sa bagong "PEP Challenge" na "Spill The 'T'" si Carmina Villarroel.

Binigyan ng mga tanong si Carmina na kailangan niyang sabihin ang totoo.

Isa sa mga tanong ay kung nagkaroon na ba ng pagkakataon na may kinumpronta siyang young actor o actress dahil sa pag-a-attitude.

Binalikan ng 45-year-old Kapuso actress ang encounter niya sa isang young actress na pinagsabihan niya dahil sa hindi magandang trato nito sa sariling ina nito.

Pagkatapos ay nagkuwento pa si Carmina ng kanyang encounter sa isa namang disrespectful young actress.

Hindi niya tuloy mapigilan na ikumpara ang batang aktres na ito sa isa pang young actress noon na hindi pa niya nakikilala pero nilapitan siya't bumati sa kanya, si Julia Montes.

Panoorin ang video para sa detalye ng kuwentong ito ni Carmina.

Para sa related article, i-click ang link na ito: http://bit.ly/CarminaJuliaMontes

Para naman sa full PEP Live interview ni Carmina, i-click ito: http://bit.ly/CarminaPEPLive

snippet.title: Parokya ni Edgar performs "Para Sa'yo" LIVE on Wish 107.5 Bus
snippet.description:
Parokya ni Edgar performs "Para Sa'yo" live on the Wish 107.5 Bus! Lifted off their 2005 album "Halina sa Parokya," this classic hit is a straightforwardly written song about changing — for the better — because of love. 

Follow Wish 107.5's social media accounts!

Facebook: https://facebook.com/WishFM1075/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Wish1075
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wish1075/

Visit Wish 107.5's awesome official website: www.wish1075.com 

Stream this song on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/1WwRGp57o6VFDZa2B5jfez?highlight=spotify:track:7JJ1NHjQ6ObYWLk1OnFyde

Follow Parokya ni Edgar on social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ParokyaNiEdgarPH/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/parokyaniedgar 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/parokyaniedgar/

Check out Universal Records' YouTube and social media accounts:
YouTube: http://bit.ly/UniversalRecPH
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/universalrecordsph
Twitter: https://twitter.com/universalrecph
Instagram: https://instagram/com/universalrecordsph

#WISHclusive

***
Wish 107.5 is an all-hits FM radio station based in Quezon City, Philippines. It has truly gone out, beyond the conventional, to provide multiple platforms where great Filipino talents can perform and showcase their music. With the Wish 107.5 Bus, people now don't need to buy concert tickets just to see their favorite artists perform on stage.  

However, innovation doesn’t stop in just delivering the coolest musical experience — Wish 107.5 has set the bar higher as it tapped the power of technology to let the Filipino artistry shine in the global stage. With its intensified investment in its digital platforms, it has transformed itself from being a local FM station to becoming a sought-after WISHclusive gateway to the world.

For more information, visit www.wish1075.com. For all-day and all-night wishful music, tune in via your radio or download the Wish 107.5 app (available for both iOS and Android users).

Feel free to SHARE this video but DO NOT REUPLOAD. Thank you!

HEART

1. TRANG TRẠI ĐÀ ĐIỂU HỒNG NAM (Ostrich Farm)
ADDRESS: Van Hoa Ward, Ba Vi District, Ha Noi
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
2. GÀ ĐỒI BA VÌ RESTAURANT
ADDRESS: TL87A, Tân Lĩnh Ward, Ba Vì District, Hà Nội
 
❤️ GRILLED OSTRICH HEART: Cube half of the heart then season with ginger, shallots, minced chillies, MSG, chicken powder, oyster sauce, sugar and cooking oil. Place the heart on skewers and grill for seven minutes.

❤️ STIR-FRIED OSTRICH HEART: Cut the heart into bite sized portions. Season with cooking oil, garlic, MSG, chicken powder, onion, carrot cuts, chillies and water. Stir-fry for two minutes, then add pineapple slices and celery. Continue stir-fry for two minutes and then serve.

💸 PRICE: 120.000 / $5.40 USD each 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
3.SONG DƯƠNG RESTAURANT
ADDRESS: 9 Hàn Thuyên, Phạm Đình Hổ Ward, Hai Bà Trưng District, Hà Nội
SOCIAL: https://songduong.com/
 
🐐 SAUTEED GOAT HEART WITH GARLIC & CELERY: Cut the goat kidney and heart in half and then slice them up. Add shallots and garlic in a hot wok. Add kidney and heart, then season with MSG, chicken powder, salt, sugar, carrots, mushrooms, onions and ginger. Add sesame oil, fresh chillies, leeks and celery. Stir-fry for two minutes and then serve. 

🐐 GOAT HEART IN TRADITIONAL MEDICINAL BROTH: Make broth from 9 different traditional medicines including ginseng, lotus seeds, leeks, mushroom, ginger, etc with goat bones for 2 hours. Cook one heart and two kidneys in the broth for five minutes. Serve with mugwort leaves. 
 
💸 PRICE: Sauteed Goat Heart - 250.000 VND / $10.08 USD | Heart in Medical Broth - 350.000 VND / $15.00 USD 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
4. MARRAKECH RIAD RESTAURANT
ADDRESS: 42/60 Nguyễn Giản Thanh, District 10, HCMC 
SOCIAL: https://www.facebook.com/Marrakech-Riad-105007374498589 

🐄  GRILLED COW HEART ON SKEWERS: Cut the heart into big, thin slices and place on grill. Season with salt and pepper then dice into cubes. Wrap the caul fat around the heart cubes and grill. Season with cumin. Plate with a pinch of cumin and salt. Serve with bread and mint tea.

🥖 MOROCCAN TRADITIONAL BREAD: Mix flour, salt, and dried yeast. Let it rest and rise for 45 minutes. Make it into a flat bread and pan fry.
 
💸 PRICE: 80.000 VND / 3.5 USD per skewer
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
5. HUYẾT CHƯNG 122
ADDRESS: 122 Phạm Văn Hai, Tân Bình District, HCMC
SOCIAL:

STEAMED BLOOD WITH ASSORTED ORGANS: Place a scoop of steamed pork blood in a bowl. Add tongue, heart, intestine, pancreas, tendon, bladder and brain. Garnish with ginger, ground pepper, scallion, and then pour in the broth. Serve with a small baguette to dip in the broth.
 
💸PRICE: 50.000 VND / 2.2 USD
